292 def init_cache(
293     redis_host: str = "localhost",
294     redis_port: int = 6379,
295     redis_db: int = 0,
296     redis_password: str = "",
297     redis_max_connections: int = 20,
298 ) -> Optional[Any]:
299     """初始化缓存层（供 app 启动时调用）
300 
301     用法:
302         from app.cache import init_cache
303         init_cache(redis_host="redis", redis_port=6379)
304     """
305     from app.cache.redis import init_redis
306 
307     client = init_redis(
308         host=redis_host,
309         port=redis_port,
310         db=redis_db,
311         password=redis_password,
312         max_connections=redis_max_connections,
313     )
314     if client:
315         logger.info(
316             f"缓存层初始化完成: Redis@{redis_host}:{redis_port}/{redis_db}"
317         )
318     else:
319         logger.warning("缓存层不可用（Redis 未连接），系统以降级模式运行")
320     return client

26 def init_redis(
27     host: str = "localhost",
28     port: int = 6379,
29     db: int = 0,
30     password: str = "",
31     max_connections: int = 20,
32     socket_timeout: float = 2.0,
33     socket_connect_timeout: float = 2.0,
34     retry_on_timeout: bool = True,
35     decode_responses: bool = False,
36 ) -> Optional["RedisClient"]:
37     """初始化全局 Redis 客户端连接池
38 
39     Args:
40         host: Redis 主机地址
41         port: Redis 端口
42         db: 数据库编号
43         password: 密码（可选）
44         max_connections: 连接池大小
45         socket_timeout: 读写超时（秒）
46         socket_connect_timeout: 连接超时（秒）
47         retry_on_timeout: 超时是否重试
48 
49     Returns:
50         RedisClient 实例，连接失败返回 None
51     """
52     global _redis_client
53     try:
54         _redis_client = RedisClient(
55             host=host,
56             port=port,
57             db=db,
58             password=password,
59             max_connections=max_connections,
60             socket_timeout=socket_timeout,
61             socket_connect_timeout=socket_connect_timeout,
62             retry_on_timeout=retry_on_timeout,
63             decode_responses=decode_responses,
64         )
65         # 健康检查
66         _redis_client.ping()
67         logger.info(
68             f"Redis 连接池初始化成功: {host}:{port}/{db}, "
69             f"pool_size={max_connections}"
70         )
71         return _redis_client
72     except Exception as e:
73         logger.warning(f"Redis 初始化失败，缓存不可用（降级运行）: {e}")
74         _redis_client = None
75         return None
76

102         self._pool = None
